/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/panda_mujoco_msgs/libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/panda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/panda_mujoco_msgs/msg/_ee_delta_command_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cyw/panda_vla_project/ros2_ws/build/panda_mujoco_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
